name: bmad-validation-metier
description: Production business validation gate. Executes each Validation Metier item against a real environment (staging/production), collecting tangible proof (API responses, DB queries, screenshots, logs). Binary verdict: ALL pass = Done, ANY fail = stays in current status. Use when 'validation metier', 'validate ticket', 'tester en staging', 'valider le ticket', 'VM' is mentioned.
